title: Design System: SoCal Family Road Trip 2026

display.purpose: Hero headline only; Playfair 900 with italic English scriptline.

label.purpose: Kickers, badges, meta tags — used sparingly, not on every section.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default card lift on warm paper.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Ease-out-quint for lifts, reveals, lightbox entrance.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal of sections (enhances an already-visible default).

components.name: Navigate Button
components.description: Primary action pill — 'navigate to this place'. Eucalyptus gradient.
components.css: .ds-nav-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; text-decoration: none; font-size: .76rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2f7350, #4c9a6b); padding: 6px 11px; border-radius: 999px; transition: transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow .2s; } .ds-nav-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px -6px rgba(47,115,80,.6); } .ds-nav-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f7350; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: 小红书 Source Link
components.description: Tertiary red pill — opens a real 小红书 reference. Red means 'open a source'.
components.css: .ds-xhs { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; text-decoration: none; font-size: .76rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: #ff2e51; padding: 6px 11px; border-radius: 999px; transition: transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow .2s; } .ds-xhs:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px -6px rgba(255,46,81,.6); } .ds-xhs:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d11e3f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Spot/food/café card. White on warm paper, lifts on hover with a warm shadow.
components.html:
🔥 爆款

格里菲斯天文台

Griffith Observatory
📍 Los Angeles

免费入场，日落 + 夜景 + 免费公众望远镜观星。
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #efe3d2; border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px 17px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -12px rgba(120,72,20,.28); transition: transform .25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow .25s; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px -20px rgba(120,72,20,.38); } .ds-heat { font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; align-self: flex-start; background: #ffe3d1; color: #e0440a; } .ds-card h4 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 9px 0 2px; color: #2a2018; } .ds-en { font-size: .78rem; color: #6b5d50; } .ds-area { font-size: .74rem; color: #f2660a; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 6px; } .ds-body { font-size: .85rem; color: #5c4a39; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Plan Tab
components.description: Large selectable tab for choosing itinerary plan A/B/C; orange-tinted when active.
components.html:
Plan A · 轻松 Chill 亲子版
Relaxed & Kid-First
components.css: .ds-plan-tab { text-align: left; cursor: pointer; border: 1.5px solid #efe3d2; background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px 18px; transition: transform .25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow .25s; } .ds-plan-tab:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -12px rgba(120,72,20,.28); } .ds-plan-tab.ds-active { border-color: #ff8c42; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -12px rgba(120,72,20,.28); background: linear-gradient(165deg, #fff1e4, #fff); } .ds-pt-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.15rem; color: #2a2018; } .ds-pt-en { font-size: .78rem; color: #6b5d50; }

components.name: Meta Chip
components.description: Small tag for cuisine / area / price metadata.
components.html: 百年市场人均 $18
components.css: .ds-chip { font-size: .72rem; background: #efe3d2; color: #5c4a39; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-chip.ds-price { background: #fbe7c4; color: #c4520a; }

components.name: Sticky Nav
components.description: Translucent sticky top bar with backdrop blur and pill links.
components.html: SoCal·2026行程 Itinerary
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; height: 60px; padding: 0 22px; background: rgba(255,248,239,.86); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid #efe3d2; } .ds-brand { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.1rem; color: #2a2018; } .ds-navlink { color: #6b5d50; text-decoration: none; font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 7px 11px; border-radius: 999px; transition: .2s; } .ds-navlink:hover { background: #efe3d2; color: #2a2018; } .ds-navlink:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f2660a; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: A keepsake travel journal lit by California's late-afternoon sun, not a booking portal and not a feed. It carries an editorial spine — a serif display voice, generous column rhythm, considered color — wrapped around genuinely useful trip logistics. The whole surface rides a committed warm-neutral paper with a single sunset gradient; green is the orange's counterweight for 'go' actions, and 小红书 red is strictly scoped to mean 'open a real source.'
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper surface + a single sunset gradient as the signature, not a flat white app shell.
Serif display (Playfair) against humanist sans (Work Sans) — real contrast, one bilingual voice.
Green = action/confirm, orange = identity/warmth, 小红书 red = open a real source.
Glanceable first: collapsible day cards, an image lightbox, lazy-loaded detail.
Dual-theme, built for bright sun and night-driving alike.

rules.name: The One-Job-Per-Color Rule
rules.body: Green means action/confirm. Red means 'open a real source.' Orange means identity and warmth. A color never borrows another's job.

rules.name: The Reading-Floor Rule
rules.body: Body and meta text must clear 4.5:1 against their actual background in both themes; --ink-soft on paper is the one to verify constantly. Light gray 'for elegance' is forbidden.

rules.name: The Bilingual Pair Rule
rules.body: Every place name appears as 中文 (primary weight) + English (lighter subtitle) as one unit — never one language alone, never two competing at equal weight.

rules.name: The One-Kicker Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked label is a deliberate accent, not section scaffolding. Do not stamp an eyebrow above every section.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are tinted with the paper's own brown hue, never neutral gray/black. A gray shadow on warm paper is the tell of a generic UI kit.

dos: Do keep the warm paper (#fff8ef) + single sunset gradient as the signature surface.
Do tint every shadow with the brown paper hue (the Warm-Shadow Rule).
Do keep green for action/confirm, red for 'open a real source,' orange for identity.
Do pair every place name 中文 + English as one unit (the Bilingual Pair Rule).
Do verify --ink-soft body text clears 4.5:1 in both themes (the Reading-Floor Rule).
Do add visible :focus-visible rings and respect prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't let it read as a generic travel-agency template — no stock heroes, no 'deals' framing, no corporate blue.
Don't let it become a cluttered 小红书 screenshot-collage — emoji are accents, not layout.
Don't drift toward a cold SaaS dashboard — no sterile gray-on-white chrome.
Don't use a border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't stamp an uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section (the One-Kicker Rule).
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as default, or gray shadows on the warm surface.
